This inconsistency strongly suggests he is lying to avoid being identified as a Werewolf. Other players, including James and Paul, also identified him as the most suspicious candidate.

parsed_output.justification: Justin is the most suspicious player due to his inconsistent claims. He initially claimed to be the Hunter (lines 99, 101), but after Mitchell also claimed the role (lines 100, 102), Justin later changed his claim to being a Mason (line 151). This flip-flopping is characteristic of a Werewolf attempting to blend in or find a believable cover after being contradicted.
